# Sherman Art Works

> Handmade glass Judaica and decorative art, crafted in Israel by the Sherman family. We make Shabbat candlesticks, Kiddush cups, shofars, horn goblets, mezuzah cases and custom corporate gifts. International shipping $45 · Israel ₪35.

Sherman Art Works is a family-run artisan studio based in Karnei Shomron, Israel. Three generations of the Sherman family handcraft blown and fused glass Judaica using traditional techniques. All products are made by hand in the studio and shipped internationally. Orders are placed via WhatsApp or email; there is no automated checkout.

## Shop

- [Candlesticks](https://shermanartworks.com/candlesticks.html): Handmade Murano-style glass Shabbat candlesticks in multiple patterns - translucent-blue circles, black-and-white stripes, gold-and-red stripes, green dots, black-and-white dots, colorful with gold accents, deep burgundy, white, and clear glass (round or rectangular). ₪540 per pair (~$177 USD). Products: [Glass Circle Candlesticks](https://shermanartworks.com/candlesticks.html#glass-circle-candlesticks), [Black and White Stripes](https://shermanartworks.com/candlesticks.html#black-white-stripes-candlesticks), [Gold and Red Stripes](https://shermanartworks.com/candlesticks.html#gold-red-stripes-candlesticks), [Green Dots](https://shermanartworks.com/candlesticks.html#green-dots-candlesticks), [Black and White Dots](https://shermanartworks.com/candlesticks.html#black-white-dots-candlesticks), [Gold Colorful](https://shermanartworks.com/candlesticks.html#gold-colorful-glass-candlesticks), [Burgundy](https://shermanartworks.com/candlesticks.html#burgundy-glass-candlesticks), [White](https://shermanartworks.com/candlesticks.html#white-glass-candlesticks), [Clear Round](https://shermanartworks.com/candlesticks.html#clear-round-glass-candlesticks), [Clear Rectangular](https://shermanartworks.com/candlesticks.html#clear-rectangular-glass-candlesticks).
- [Horn Goblets](https://shermanartworks.com/horn-goblets.html): Silver-plated ram's horn wine goblets (Lion of Judah, Menorah) and a Jerusalem wine horn decorated with traditional Jewish symbols. All coated with FDA-approved crystal epoxy. Prices ₪473-₪850. Products: [Jerusalem Wine Horn](https://shermanartworks.com/horn-goblets.html#jerusalem-wine-horn), [Lion of Judah Goblet](https://shermanartworks.com/horn-goblets.html#lion-of-judah-goblet), [Menorah Goblet](https://shermanartworks.com/horn-goblets.html#menorah-goblet).
- [Kiddush Cups](https://shermanartworks.com/kiddush-cups.html): Handmade glass and ceramic Kiddush cups for Shabbat and Jewish holidays. Tall glass cups (blue, colorful, red) and low glass cups (white, colorful/orange), plus a ceramic cup with Menorah symbol and Aramaic lettering - all with silver-plated rim, ₪470 each (ceramic ₪480). Also a colorful glass cup and plate set (₪680), a Kiddush cup plate sold separately (₪364), and silver-plated ram's horn goblets (Lion of Judah, Menorah) - ₪473. All made to order. Products: [Tall Blue Glass Cup](https://shermanartworks.com/kiddush-cups.html#tall-blue-glass-cup), [Tall Colorful Glass Cup](https://shermanartworks.com/kiddush-cups.html#tall-colorful-glass-cup), [Tall Red Glass Cup](https://shermanartworks.com/kiddush-cups.html#tall-red-glass-cup), [Low White Glass Cup](https://shermanartworks.com/kiddush-cups.html#low-white-glass-cup), [Low Colorful Glass Cup](https://shermanartworks.com/kiddush-cups.html#low-colorful-glass-cup), [Ceramic Kiddush Cup](https://shermanartworks.com/kiddush-cups.html#ceramic-kiddush-cup), [Colorful Glass Cup and Plate](https://shermanartworks.com/kiddush-cups.html#colorful-glass-cup-and-plate), [Kiddush Cup Plate](https://shermanartworks.com/kiddush-cups.html#kiddush-cup-plate), [Lion of Judah Goblet](https://shermanartworks.com/kiddush-cups.html#lion-of-judah-goblet), [Menorah Goblet](https://shermanartworks.com/kiddush-cups.html#menorah-goblet).
- [Trays & Bowls](https://shermanartworks.com/trays-bowls.html): Decorative handmade glass bowls and sculptural trays. Organic, asymmetric forms with marbled glass finishes. ₪950. Also features a handmade Kiddush cup plate (₪364). Products: [Glass Decorative Bowl](https://shermanartworks.com/trays-bowls.html#glass-decorative-bowl), [Kiddush Cup Plate](https://shermanartworks.com/trays-bowls.html#kiddush-cup-plate).
- [Mezuzahs](https://shermanartworks.com/mezuzahs.html): Handmade mezuzah cases - a clear glass case (₪320) and Oryx, Ram and Kudu horn cases covered in silver (₪700 each). Mezuzah case only - parchment (klaf) not included. Products: [Clear Glass Mezuzah](https://shermanartworks.com/mezuzahs.html#clear-glass-mezuzah), [Oryx Mezuzah](https://shermanartworks.com/mezuzahs.html#oryx-mezuzah), [Ram Mezuzah](https://shermanartworks.com/mezuzahs.html#ram-mezuzah), [Kudu Mezuzah](https://shermanartworks.com/mezuzahs.html#kudu-mezuzah).
- [Shofars](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html): Kudu and ram's-horn shofars, each hand-decorated in 925 silver. Kudu designs are sold by size (S–XJ, 70–129 cm / 28–51 in), ₪1,214–₪2,423: Hoshen Stones, Jerusalem Lions, Jerusalem Lions with Menorah, The Holy Ark, The Spies (Meraglim), Messianic Seal of Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Star of David, Menorah, and Shofar Blowing. Ram's-horn designs are sold by size (XS–XJ, 30–65 cm / 12–26 in), ₪418–₪2,368: Hoshen Stones, Jerusalem, Star of David, Star of David with Blue Crystals, Tka BeShofar Gadol, Jerusalem Lions, Jerusalem with White Crystals, Star of David with Blue Stone, Messianic Seal of Jerusalem, and Menorah. Also two fully personalised shofars with a choice of engraved symbol and optional Hebrew/English inscription, both sold by size: a ram's-horn custom (XS–XJ, 30–65 cm / 12–26 in), ₪742–₪2,718, and a kudu custom offering the full engraved design range (Mini–XJ, 50–129 cm / 20–51 in), ₪1,297–₪2,769. Made to order. Products: [Kudu Shofar – Hoshen Stones](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#kudu-hoshen-stones), [Kudu Shofar – Jerusalem Lions](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#kudu-jerusalem-lions), [Kudu Shofar – Jerusalem Lions with Menorah](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#kudu-jerusalem-lions-menorah), [Kudu Shofar – The Holy Ark](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#kudu-holy-ark), [Kudu Shofar – The Spies (Meraglim)](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#kudu-spies-meraglim), [Kudu Shofar – Messianic Seal of Jerusalem](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#kudu-messianic-seal-jerusalem), [Kudu Shofar – Jerusalem](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#kudu-jerusalem), [Kudu Shofar – Star of David](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#kudu-star-of-david), [Kudu Shofar – Menorah](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#kudu-menorah), [Kudu Shofar – Shofar Blowing](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#kudu-shofar-blowing), [Ram's Horn Shofar – Hoshen Stones](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#rams-hoshen-stones), [Ram's Horn Shofar – Jerusalem](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#rams-jerusalem), [Ram's Horn Shofar – Star of David](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#rams-star-of-david), [Ram's Horn Shofar – Star of David with Blue Crystals](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#rams-star-of-david-blue-crystals), [Ram's Horn Shofar – Tka BeShofar Gadol](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#rams-tka-beshofar-gadol), [Ram's Horn Shofar – Jerusalem Lions](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#rams-jerusalem-lions), [Ram's Horn Shofar – Jerusalem with White Crystals](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#rams-jerusalem-white-crystals), [Ram's Horn Shofar – Star of David with Blue Stone](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#rams-star-of-david-blue-stone), [Ram's Horn Shofar – Messianic Seal of Jerusalem](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#rams-messianic-seal-jerusalem), [Ram's Horn Shofar – Menorah](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#rams-menorah), [Custom Ram's Horn Shofar, Symbol & Text](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#custom-shofar), [Custom Kudu Shofar, Symbol & Text](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars.html#custom-kudu-shofar). Browse by sub-category: [Custom Shofars](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars-custom.html) (both personalised shofars), [Ram's Horn Shofars](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars-rams.html) (the personalised ram's horn plus all ten ram's designs), [Kudu Shofars](https://shermanartworks.com/shofars-kudu.html) (the personalised kudu plus all ten kudu designs). Ram's-horn shofars may arrive with the silver plating in one continuous piece or split into two parts, depending on the shape and size of the horn; buyers can state a preference in the comment box when ordering.
- [Business Gifts](https://shermanartworks.com/business-gifts.html): Custom shofars (from ₪742) and handmade glass corporate gifts, made to order with personalised symbols and text inscription. Both custom shofars are sold by size: ram's-horn ₪742–₪2,718 and kudu ₪1,297–₪2,769. Suitable for Jewish organisations, synagogues and corporate clients. Products: [Custom Ram's Horn Shofar, Symbol & Text](https://shermanartworks.com/business-gifts.html#custom-shofar), [Custom Kudu Shofar, Symbol & Text](https://shermanartworks.com/business-gifts.html#custom-kudu-shofar).

## Custom Orders

- [Custom Orders](https://shermanartworks.com/custom-orders.html): Commission a one-of-a-kind handmade piece. Custom size, colour, shape and inscription available. Contact via WhatsApp or email.

## About

- [About Sherman Art Works](https://shermanartworks.com/about.html): The story of three generations of the Sherman family handcrafting glass art in Israel.

## Contact & Ordering

- [Contact](https://shermanartworks.com/contact.html): WhatsApp: +972-52-348-2278. Email: shermanartworks@gmail.com. We reply within 24 hours. All orders are placed via WhatsApp or email.
- [Shipping & Terms](https://shermanartworks.com/terms.html): International shipping $45 · Israel ₪35. Handcrafted to order - delivery within up to 30 business days, usually much sooner. Full terms and conditions.
- [Privacy Policy](https://shermanartworks.com/privacy.html): Privacy policy for shermanartworks.com.
